# Literature Review {#sec-litreview}

Provide a critical review of the relevant literature here.

Organise the review thematically rather than chronologically. Identify the key debates, agreements, and gaps in the existing work, and explain how your thesis addresses one of those gaps.

## Topic area one

Summarise and critique the literature on the first major theme.

## Topic area two

Summarise and critique the literature on the second major theme. @ma2025 will discuss this in my future paper.

## Gaps in the literature

Conclude the review by articulating the specific gap your thesis addresses, linking it directly to your research question in @sec-intro.
